aiKeys.title: Anthropic API Key
aiKeys.info: Use your own Anthropic API key for AI-powered insights. Your key is stored securely in Azure Key Vault and is never exposed.

sharing.title: Data Sharing
sharing.premiumDescription: Data sharing is a Premium feature. Share your financial data securely with your advisor.
sharing.emptyState: No active shares. Invite an advisor to get started.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.digestDescription: Receive a weekly summary of your financial activity
notifications.syncAlertsDescription: Get notified when a linked account has sync issues
notifications.coverageAlertsDescription: Alert when assets are missing beneficiary assignments
notifications.tierAlertsDescription: Warn when approaching subscription tier limits

export.title: Data Export
export.description: Download a complete copy of all your data in JSON format. This satisfies GDPR Article 20 (right to data portability).
export.linkExpiryNote: Export links expire after 1 hour. You can request a new export at any time.
export.includesList: Profile, assets, contacts, accounts, transactions, documents, sharing grants, AI usage, audit log

delete.title: Permanently delete your account
delete.warning: After requesting deletion, you have a 30-day grace period to change your mind. After that, all data is permanently and irreversibly deleted.
delete.confirmTitle: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.
delete.confirmDescription: Type your email address to confirm account deletion.
delete.reasonLabel: Help us improve: why are you leaving? (optional)
delete.scheduledBanner: Your account is scheduled for deletion on {{date}} ({{days}} days remaining)
